# Micro Offer Studio

Public offer catalog for generated digital products, productized micro-services, and free browser-only lead tools.
Confirmed earned money remains $0 until external buyer/payment/payout proof exists.

## Fastest paid paths
- Fastest $100 Start: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/fastest-100-start.html
- Automation Blueprint: $100 service, one accepted paid order reaches $100. https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/automation-blueprint.html
- Data Cleanup Sprint: $125 service, one accepted paid order clears $100. https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/data-cleanup-sprint.html
- Website Audit Microservice: $150 service, one accepted paid order clears $100. https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/website-audit-microservice.html

## Ready-to-buy routes
- Buyer response autopilot: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/buyer-response-playbook.html
- Ready-to-buy index: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy.html
- Buyer intent router: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/buyer-intent-router.html
- Static Demo Site Customization: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-static-demo-site-customization.html -> https://jaxassistant55.github.io/static-service-site-starter/inquiry.html
- Local SEO / GBP Audit: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-local-seo-gbp-audit.html -> https://jaxassistant55.github.io/local-seo-gbp-audit-starter/inquiry.html
- Niche Quote Estimator: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-niche-quote-estimator.html -> https://jaxassistant55.github.io/niche-quote-estimator-starter/inquiry.html
- Website Audit Microservice: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-website-audit-microservice.html -> https://jaxassistant55.github.io/website-audit-microservice-starter/inquiry.html
- AI Workflow Tracker Sprint: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-ai-workflow-tracker-sprint.html -> https://jaxassistant55.github.io/workflow-tracker-dashboard-starter/inquiry.html
- Technical Docs Cleanup: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-technical-docs-cleanup.html -> https://jaxassistant55.github.io/technical-docs-cleanup-starter/inquiry.html
- Resume / LinkedIn / Interview Pack: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-resume-linkedin-interview-pack.html -> https://jaxassistant55.github.io/career-packet-starter/inquiry.html
- PDF/Table Extraction: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-pdf-table-extraction.html -> https://jaxassistant55.github.io/pdf-table-extraction-starter/inquiry.html
- Client Intake and SOP Package: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-client-intake-and-sop-package.html -> https://jaxassistant55.github.io/client-intake-sop-starter/inquiry.html
- Data Cleanup Sprint: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-data-cleanup-sprint.html -> https://jaxassistant55.github.io/data-cleanup-sprint-starter/inquiry.html
- Automation Blueprint: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-automation-blueprint.html -> https://jaxassistant55.github.io/automation-blueprint-starter/inquiry.html
- Content Repurposing Sprint: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-content-repurposing-sprint.html -> https://jaxassistant55.github.io/content-repurposing-sprint-starter/inquiry.html

## Free tools that route to paid services
- CSV Cleaner Lite: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/csv-cleaner-lite.html -> Data Cleanup Sprint $125
- Website Audit Lite: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/website-audit-lite.html -> Website Audit Microservice $150
- Workflow Blueprint Lite: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/workflow-blueprint-lite.html -> Automation Blueprint $100
- AI Workflow Tracker Brief Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ai-workflow-tracker-brief-builder.html -> AI Workflow Tracker Sprint $150
- Static Demo Site Brief Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/static-demo-site-brief-builder.html -> Static Demo Site Customization $200
- Quote Estimator Scope Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/quote-estimator-scope-builder.html -> Niche Quote Estimator $150
- Local SEO/GBP Brief Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/local-seo-gbp-brief-builder.html -> Local SEO / GBP Audit $175
- Client Intake/SOP Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/client-intake-sop-builder.html -> Client Intake and SOP Package $125
- Career Packet Brief Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/career-packet-brief-builder.html -> Resume / LinkedIn / Interview Pack $125
- Invoice/Expense Snapshot: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/invoice-expense-snapshot.html -> Invoice and Expense Tracker Template $19
- Prompt Workflow Brief Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/prompt-workflow-brief-builder.html -> Prompt Workflow Pack $19
- Resale Listing Draft Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/resale-listing-draft-builder.html -> Resale Listing and Price Research Pack $100
- Proposal/Profile Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/proposal-profile-builder.html -> Sales Enablement Kit $29
- Localization QA Brief Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/localization-qa-brief-builder.html -> Translation and Localization Draft Pack $100
- Subscription Savings Calculator: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/subscription-savings-calculator.html -> Subscription Audit and Savings Prep Pack $100
- Content Repurposing Brief Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/content-repurposing-brief-builder.html -> Content Repurposing Sprint $100
- Technical Docs Audit Brief Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/technical-docs-audit-brief-builder.html -> Technical Docs Cleanup $150
- PDF/Table Intake Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/pdf-table-intake-builder.html -> PDF/Table Extraction $125
- HTML5 Micro Game Kit Preview Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/html5-micro-game-kit-preview-builder.html -> HTML5 Micro Game Kit $19
- Procedural SFX Pack Preview Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/procedural-sfx-pack-preview-builder.html -> Procedural SFX Pack $12
- SVG Icon Pack Preview Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/svg-icon-pack-preview-builder.html -> SVG Icon Pack $15
- Printable Puzzle and Planner Pack Preview Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/printable-puzzle-and-planner-pack-preview-builder.html -> Printable Puzzle and Planner Pack $14
- Synthetic Mock Dataset Pack Preview Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/synthetic-mock-dataset-pack-preview-builder.html -> Synthetic Mock Dataset Pack $19
- Browser Extension Template Preview Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/browser-extension-template-preview-builder.html -> Browser Extension Template $29
- CSV CLI Toolkit Preview Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/csv-cli-toolkit-preview-builder.html -> CSV CLI Toolkit $19
- CSS Component Pack Preview Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/css-component-pack-preview-builder.html -> CSS Component Pack $19
- SVG Wallpaper Pattern Pack Preview Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/svg-wallpaper-pattern-pack-preview-builder.html -> SVG Wallpaper Pattern Pack $9
- Anki-Ready Flashcard Deck Preview Builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/anki-ready-flashcard-deck-preview-builder.html -> Anki-Ready Flashcard Deck $12

## Ready-To-Buy Signal Room
- Signal room: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-signal-room.html
- CSV: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-signal-room.csv
- JSON: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/ready-to-buy-signal-room.json
- Central signal issue: https://github.com/jaxassistant55/jax-micro-offer-studio/issues/29
- Rows: 34 one-sale-to-$100 routes with buyer actions, payment packets, order boards, and proof gates.
- Structured data: 34 Offer entries in JSON-LD on the signal-room page.
- Boundary: signal-room pages, CSV/JSON rows, structured data, issue comments, and IndexNow submissions count $0 until external buyer acceptance, seller-owned payment proof, delivery proof, and posted/released/payable/cleared funds exist.

## Machine-readable files
- Search index: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/search-index.json
- Structured data graph: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/structured-data.json
- RSS feed: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/sitemap.xml
- Start order builder: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/start-order.html

## Safety and proof boundary
Do not treat public pages, issue drafts, estimates, samples, traffic, or tool usage as earned money. Count only external payment, payout, refund, credit, funded order, or payable-balance proof.
- Close A Service Order: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/close-service-order.html - close-ready scripts, invoice lines, proof gates, and stop conditions for $100+ service orders.
- Delivery Acceptance: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/delivery-acceptance.html - delivery, acceptance, revision, and proof gates for $100+ service orders.
- Download Follow-Up: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/download-followup.html - preview-release download follow-up routes to paid inquiries and order boards.

- Hot download close rooms: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/hot-download-close-local-seo-gbp-audit-starter.html | https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/hot-download-close-pdf-table-extraction-starter.html | https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/hot_download_close_rooms.csv

## First $100 Fast Start
- Exact $100 starter route: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/first-100-fast-start.html
- CSV: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/first_100_fast_start.csv
- Sample pack: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/first-100-sample-pack.zip
- Order board #24: https://github.com/jaxassistant55/jax-micro-offer-studio/issues/24
- Boundary: intake only; count money only after external payment is posted, released, payable, or cleared.

## Payment Activation
- Payment activation page: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/payment-activation
- Payment link template CSV: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/payment_links_template.csv
- Service invoice drafts CSV: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/service_invoice_drafts.csv
- Boundary: this page generates payment messages only; count money only after external payment proof exists.
## First $100 Product Bundle Terms
- Terms and acceptance close page: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/first-100-product-bundle-terms.html
- Terms CSV: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/first-100-product-bundle-terms.csv
- Exact buyer acceptance: I accept the First $100 Product Bundle Terms at $100. I understand the private ZIP is delivered only after seller-owned external payment proof exists; the bundle is for my internal or client-project use only; I will not resell, redistribute, sublicense, or post the paid files publicly; and custom implementation or support is not included unless separately agreed before payment.
- Boundary: count $0 unless a real buyer accepts terms, pays through a seller-owned external route, receives private delivery, and funds are posted, released, payable, or cleared.

## First $100 Fast Start Terms
- Terms and acceptance close page: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/first-100-fast-start-terms.html
- Terms CSV: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/first-100-fast-start-terms.csv
- Exact buyer acceptance: I accept the First $100 Fast Start fixed-scope terms at $100. I understand work starts only after seller-owned external payment proof exists; I will provide only public or buyer-authorized non-sensitive inputs; the selected starter scope is limited to the deliverable described on the First $100 Fast Start page; and custom implementation, account login work, credential handling, regulated advice, paid ads, purchasing, ongoing support, or extra revisions are not included unless separately agreed before payment.
- Boundary: count $0 unless a real buyer accepts scope, pays through a seller-owned external route, receives delivery, and funds are posted, released, payable, or cleared.

- Local SEO / GBP Audit terms and acceptance: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/local-seo-gbp-audit-terms.html | CSV https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/local-seo-gbp-audit-terms.csv

- PDF/Table Extraction terms and acceptance: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/pdf-table-extraction-terms.html | CSV https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/pdf-table-extraction-terms.csv

## One Sale To $100 Close Now
- Close page: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/one-sale-to-100.html
- JSON: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/one-sale-to-100.json
- CSV: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/one-sale-to-100.csv
- Rows: 34 fixed-price routes where one accepted paid order can reach $100 before fees/refunds.
- Boundary: count $0 until external buyer acceptance, seller-owned payment proof, delivery proof, and posted/released/payable/cleared funds exist.

## One Sale Payment Packets
- Payment packet page: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/one-sale-payment-packets.html
- CSV: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/one-sale-payment-packets.csv
- JSON: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/one-sale-payment-packets.json
- Rows: 34 seller-side invoice/payment-request packets for one-sale-to-$100 routes.
- Boundary: generated packets are not payment proof; count money only after accepted scope, seller-owned external payment proof, delivery proof, and posted/released/payable/cleared funds exist.
## Marketplace Listing Packets
- Page: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/marketplace-listing-packets.html
- CSV: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/marketplace-listing-packets.csv
- JSON: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/marketplace-listing-packets.json
- Rows: 34 platform-neutral listing packets for one-sale-to-$100 routes.
- Boundary: generated listing packets are not posted listings and not payment proof; count money only after real buyer acceptance, seller-owned external payment proof, delivery proof, and posted/released/payable/cleared funds exist.

## Marketplace Listing Packets Release
- Release: https://github.com/jaxassistant55/jax-micro-offer-studio/releases/tag/marketplace-listing-packets-v1
- Assets: ZIP, CSV, JSON, and release manifest.
- Boundary: release downloads are interest-only and count $0 until real buyer/payment/delivery/payout proof exists.
- PDF Table Download Intent Close: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/pdf-table-download-intent-close.html - observed PDF/Table preview downloads=2, close-ready packet downloads=1; routes buyers to exact terms, ready-to-pay intake, payment activation, and proof monitor; money remains $0 until external payment proof exists.
- Local SEO Download Intent Close: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/local-seo-download-intent-close.html - observed Local SEO preview downloads=2, close-ready packet downloads=0; routes buyers to exact terms, ready-to-pay intake, payment activation, and proof monitor; money remains $0 until external payment proof exists.

## Non-Bounty Paid Lead Offer
- Three.js WebGL Renderer Lite: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/threejs-webgl-renderer-lite.html -> $100 fixed-scope renderer sample, ready-to-pay intake, payment activation, and proof boundary.

## Non-Bounty Paid Help Blueprint
- GitHub Markdown Publish Bridge Blueprint: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/github-markdown-publish-bridge.html -> $100 fixed-scope GitHub API/OAuth publishing blueprint, ready-to-pay intake, payment activation, and proof boundary.

## Non-Bounty Paid Diagnostic
- Azure SWA Custom Domain Validation Diagnostic: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/azure-swa-domain-validation-diagnostic.html -> $100 fixed-scope public-safe DNS/Azure/IaC diagnostic brief, ready-to-pay intake, payment activation, and proof boundary.

## Non-Bounty Paid Payment Integration Offer
- Payment Integration Blueprint Sprint: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/payment-integration-blueprint-sprint.html -> $100 fixed-scope public-safe Stripe/PayPal/webhook/payment-flow blueprint, ready-to-pay intake, payment activation, and proof boundary.

## Non-Bounty Paid Minecraft Config Offer
- WeaponMechanics Item Model Compatibility Sprint: https://jaxassistant55.github.io/jax-micro-offer-studio/weaponmechanics-item-model-compatibility-sprint.html -> $100 fixed-scope public-safe Item_Model compatibility blueprint, wiki patch draft, ready-to-pay intake, payment activation, and proof boundary.
